_comment: Reference config for OpenClaw 2026.3.1. The actual config is generated via CLI (openclaw config set, openclaw agents add). This file documents the target state.

mappings.messageTemplate: GitHub PR webhook received. Action: {{action}}. PR #{{pull_request.number}} on {{repository.full_name}}. Title: {{pull_request.title}}. Dispatch a review pipeline if appropriate.

Dispatch Service callback: event={{event}}, pipeline={{data.pipeline}}, status={{data.status}}, ticketId={{data.ticketId}}, prUrl={{data.prUrl}}, prNumber={{data.prNumber}}, branch={{data.branch}}, repository={{data.repository}}, cost={{data.costUsd}}USD, duration={{data.durationMs}}ms, session={{data.sessionId}}, summary={{data.summary}}. If pipeline=refine, parse the summary JSON and act on the refine result (pass_through → dispatch feature, decompose → create sub-tickets and dispatch each, escalate → add questions to Notion). Otherwise, follow the pipeline chaining logic in BOOTSTRAP.md: feature/hotfix with PR → dispatch review; review approved → mark done; failure → mark failed.
